description: Deliver pixel-accurate prototype replication for core public pages with dark and light route variants.

userStories.title: Establish prototype route and node traceability baseline
userStories.description: As a frontend engineer, I want a stable route-to-prototype mapping so that each page implementation can be verified against the correct source node.
acceptanceCriteria: Define route-to-prototype mapping for /login, /, /skills/:id, /compare, and /docs in implementation notes or config
Reference prototype node IDs and target screenshots for dark and light variants
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create shared public-page style tokens for dark and light variants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want centralized tokens and sizing primitives so that multiple pages can be aligned consistently and maintained safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add reusable token groups for typography, spacing, radii, and color surfaces used by public pages
Support route-driven dark/light style switching without duplicated hardcoded values
No new hard max-lines violations introduced by this story
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Align login page to prototype in dark and light
userStories.description: As a user, I want the login page to match the prototype layout and components so that sign-in experience is visually consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Login top bar, two-column panels, typography, form controls, and OAuth block match prototype geometry
Dark and /light/login variants both render with their target palette and component hierarchy
Primary CTA, locale switch, and provider actions remain functional
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align marketplace home page to prototype in dark and light
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the marketplace home page to replicate prototype sections so that information density and hierarchy are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Top navigation, hero, search workbench, filter panel, and results panel match prototype spacing and sizes
Dark and /light variants align with corresponding prototype screenshots
Core interactions keep working: navigation buttons, pagination, and CTA links
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align skill detail page to prototype in dark and light
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want skill detail visual structure to match prototype so that metadata, actions, and comparison context are easy to scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Header section, metadata cards, action bar, and content modules match prototype layout
Dark and /light skill detail routes use correct typography and color hierarchy
Install and related action buttons remain functional
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align compare and docs public pages to prototype style system
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want compare and docs pages to follow the same prototype language so that all public flows feel cohesive.
acceptanceCriteria: Compare page and docs page use shared token system and match target prototype style
Dark and light route variants are both supported for these pages
No broken navigation between public pages after style alignment
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add visual verification checklist and screenshot evidence for public routes
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable visual checks so that prototype alignment regressions are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Capture baseline screenshots for /login, /light/login, /, /light, /skills/:id, and /light/skills/:id
Document pass/fail alignment notes per route in progress tracking notes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
